content.titre: Everything you need to know before getting started

items.question: How does the 50% tax credit work?
items.reponse: For cleaning in your home, you benefit from a tax credit equal to 50% of the amounts paid (capped at €12,000 per year per household). In practice, an hour billed at €30 actually costs you only €15. SANAD CLEAN works through the Accès SAP cooperative, registered as a home help service, which entitles you to this benefit.

items.question: What is the instant advance?
items.reponse: Thanks to the instant tax-credit advance (URSSAF), you pay only the remaining half right away, without waiting for the following year's tax return. The scheme is managed through the Accès SAP cooperative.

items.question: Does the tax credit apply to office cleaning?
items.reponse: No. The 50% tax credit only applies to services carried out at a private individual's home. Cleaning of commercial premises, deep cleaning and pest control are billed on quote, without a tax credit.

items.question: Which towns do you cover?
items.reponse: We work in Nîmes and the surrounding towns (Caissargues, Marguerittes, Saint-Gilles, Bouillargues, Manduel, Milhaud…). Contact us to confirm your area.

content.titre: Ready for a spotless home again?
content.sousTitre: Free, no-obligation quote. Quick reply by phone, WhatsApp or email.

items.question: How does the 50% tax credit work?
items.reponse: For cleaning in your home, you benefit from a tax credit equal to 50% of the amounts paid (capped at €12,000 per year per household). In practice, an hour billed at €30 actually costs you only €15. SANAD CLEAN works through the Accès SAP cooperative, registered as a home help service, which entitles you to this benefit.

items.question: What is the instant advance?
items.reponse: Thanks to the instant tax-credit advance (URSSAF), you pay only the remaining half right away, without waiting for the following year's tax return. The scheme is managed through the Accès SAP cooperative.

items.question: Does the tax credit apply to office cleaning?
items.reponse: No. The 50% tax credit only applies to services carried out at a private individual's home. Cleaning of commercial premises, deep cleaning and pest control are billed on quote, without a tax credit.
